pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the collaboration model that fits

0.name: Project-based
0.description: Perfect for well-defined projects with fixed budget

1.name: Retainer
1.description: Dedicated team for continuous product development

2.name: Performance
2.description: We earn only when you earn

0.q: How long does AI automation development take?
0.a: First results visible in 2-4 weeks. AI agent MVP launches in 4-6 weeks. Full integration with your systems — 2-3 months.

1.q: What budget is needed to start?
1.a: Minimum automation project starts from $5,000. Retainer — from $3,000/month. We also offer a performance model where you pay only for results.

2.a: OpenAI, Anthropic, LangChain for AI. React, Next.js, Django for development. n8n and custom solutions for automation. Supabase, PostgreSQL for data.

3.q: We're not a technical company. Is that OK?
3.a: Absolutely. 70% of our clients are non-technical companies. We handle all the technical part and explain everything in simple language.

4.a: 24/7 monitoring, AI model updates, performance optimization, priority support in Telegram. First 3 months — free.

5.a: We set metrics before project start: hours saved, conversion increase, cost reduction. Monthly reports with real numbers.

contact_page.title: Contact
contact_page.description: Ready to discuss your project? Fill out the form or contact us directly
contact_page.faq_desc: Answers to popular questions about our work

0.q: How much does website development cost?
0.a: Cost depends on complexity and functionality. Landing — from $500, corporate site — from $1500, web app — from $3000. Take our quiz for an accurate estimate.

1.q: How long does project development take?
1.a: Timelines depend on scope. Landing — 1-2 weeks, corporate site — 3-4 weeks, complex web apps — 2-4 months. We always meet agreed deadlines.

2.a: Yes, we offer technical support and project maintenance. Includes bug fixes, updates and adding new features on request.

3.q: Do you work with international clients?
3.a: Yes, we work with clients worldwide. We communicate in Russian, Uzbek and English. We accept payments in various currencies.

4.a: Our process: Analysis → Design → Development → Testing → Launch → Support. At each stage you receive regular reports and can make changes.
